title: Roadster 20pc Large Car Fuse Replacement Set - 5 to 30 AMP, 5A, 10A, 15A, 20A, 25A and 30A in multi value pack
features: COMPREHENSIVE SET: Contains 20 pieces of colour-coded car fuses ranging from 5 AMP to 30 AMP, perfect for most vehicle maintenance needs
UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY: Designed to work with most types of cars, providing reliable electrical circuit protection and easy replacement options
AMPERAGE RANGE: Includes essential amperage ratings - 5A, 10A, 15A, 20A, 25A, and 30A fuses to cover various automotive electrical requirements
COLOUR CODING: Each amperage rating features a distinct colour for quick identification and proper replacement selection
CONVENIENT STORAGE: Comes in a clear, organised case that keeps fuses secure and easily accessible when needed
description: Keep your vehicle running safely with this comprehensive 20-piece car fuse replacement set from Roadster. This versatile kit includes colour-coded automotive fuses ranging from 5 to 30 AMP, making it compatible with most types of cars. The set features clearly marked amperage ratings (5A, 10A, 15A, 20A, 25A, and 30A) with distinct colours for easy identification and replacement. Each fuse is designed to provide reliable circuit protection for your vehicle's electrical systems. The assorted pack ensures you'll have the right fuse on hand when needed, helping you avoid roadside emergencies. Perfect for both professional mechanics and DIY car maintenance enthusiasts, this comprehensive set helps maintain your vehicle's electrical safety. The transparent housing of each fuse allows for quick visual inspection to identify blown fuses, while the sturdy construction ensures reliable performance under standard operating conditions.
